title: ⚠️ TikTok Platform Issues — Ongoing System Disruptions
description:
⚠️ **TIKTOK PLATFORM ISSUE NOTICE** ⚠️

@everyone

Creators,

TikTok is currently experiencing a platform-wide infrastructure issue that began on **March 3, 2026** and is continuing into **March 4, 2026**.

This disruption is related to backend infrastructure connected to **Oracle systems used by TikTok**. As a result, several parts of the platform may not be functioning normally.

These issues are occurring across the platform and are **not related to Infinitum LIVE or your standing within the network**.

---

## ⚠️ ISSUES CURRENTLY BEING REPORTED

Creators across the platform may experience:

- Videos stuck at very low view counts (commonly 0–200 views)
- Videos not being pushed into normal distribution
- LIVE streams receiving unusually low reach or traffic
- Platform lag, glitches, or delayed responses
- Analytics updating slowly or incorrectly
- Earnings and payout displays showing delayed information

Additional inconsistencies may occur while TikTok stabilizes their infrastructure.

---

## 💰 PAYOUT CLARIFICATION

TikTok payouts are **scheduled for Wednesdays and can process anytime up until approximately 9:00 PM PST**.

It is normal for payouts to appear later in the day and not necessarily early in the morning.

If payouts appear delayed today, it may be related to the ongoing platform issue and reporting delays.

---

## ✅ WHAT CREATORS SHOULD DO

Please continue normal activity:

- Continue posting content
- Continue going LIVE
- Do NOT delete or repost content due to temporary low views
- Allow time for analytics and payouts to update once systems stabilize

Deleting and reposting content during platform instability can sometimes harm distribution once systems normalize.

---

TikTok engineering teams are currently working to resolve the issue. Once their infrastructure stabilizes, normal distribution, LIVE reach, analytics, and payout reporting should return automatically.

We will continue monitoring the situation and will provide updates if TikTok releases official guidance.

Thank you for your patience while the platform works through this issue.

title: 🚨 LIVE Compliance Reminder — Zero Tolerance Policy
description:
🚨 **MANDATORY LIVE POLICY REMINDER — ZERO TOLERANCE** 🚨

@everyone

Creators,

All creators must strictly follow TikTok platform rules and Infinitum LIVE standards at all times.

---

## ❌ STRICTLY PROHIBITED DURING LIVE

The following are NOT allowed:

- Static images or frozen screens
- No visible movement or inactive camera feeds
- Low visual quality streams (blurred, dark, obstructed, or non-engaging visuals)
- QR codes displayed on screen
- Any content that appears inactive, automated, or non-interactive

If you are LIVE, you must be visibly present, actively engaging, and producing compliant, high-quality content at all times.

---

## ⚖️ COMMUNITY GUIDELINES APPLY AT ALL TIMES

All creators are required to follow **ALL TikTok Community Guidelines at all times** — regardless of whether the 18+ feature is enabled or not.

The 18+ setting does NOT exempt anyone from platform policies.

---

## ⚠️ CONSEQUENCES

Violations can result in:

- Individual LIVE penalties
- Network-level violations
- Immediate removal from the Infinitum LIVE Creator Network

Repeated or severe violations will result in removal without additional warning.

If you are unsure whether your content is compliant, contact your assigned manager BEFORE going LIVE.

Protect the network.
Protect your account.
Stay compliant.

title: 📢 Infinitum LIVE – TikTok LIVE Platform Clarification & Network Policy Update
description:
📢 **IMPORTANT: TIKTOK LIVE & INFINITUM LIVE OFFICIAL UPDATE**

Creators,

We want to provide clear, accurate updates regarding recent changes related to TikTok LIVE and important Infinitum LIVE Creator Network policies. There has been a significant amount of confusion and misinformation circulating, so please read this notice carefully.

To be absolutely clear upfront:

**Infinitum LIVE Creator Network is not TikTok.**
We do not own TikTok, control TikTok systems, algorithms, enforcement actions, or payouts. Our role is to support creators within the rules, policies, and structure established by TikTok.

---

## 📱 TikTok LIVE – Current Platform Updates

### 1️⃣ TikTok Ownership Update (U.S.)
Recent announcements confirm that TikTok’s U.S. operations are now **majority U.S.-owned**, with **80.01% ownership under U.S. control**, and the remaining ownership held by ByteDance.

### 2️⃣ U.S. Algorithm Retraining
TikTok is actively retraining and restructuring the **U.S. algorithm** to improve platform compliance, safety, and long-term stability.

- This does **not** remove access to global audiences
- U.S. creators continue to interact with worldwide creators and viewers

### 3️⃣ U.S. Government Ownership Rumor — False
TikTok is **not owned by the U.S. government**. Claims suggesting direct government ownership are incorrect.

### 4️⃣ Tracking & Privacy Clarification
There is **no forced 24/7 tracking** enabled by TikTok.

- TikTok does not automatically send location data or content to any government entity
- Location access is fully controlled by your phone’s app permissions, like any other app
- Any law-enforcement access would require proper legal process, consistent with all major platforms

---

## 🛡️ Infinitum LIVE Creator Network – Policy Updates

The following policies are **TikTok LIVE–specific** and are **not optional**.

### 5️⃣ Creator Activity Requirement (Strict Enforcement)
Any creator who is **inactive for 3 months or longer** will be removed from the Infinitum LIVE Creator Network.

- No exceptions
- No exclusions
- No retroactive excuses

If you have not gone LIVE in 3 months or longer, you are considered inactive. To remain in the network, you must resume going LIVE immediately.

---

## 💎 Diamond Incentive Program Update

### 6️⃣ Temporary Pause — March 2026
The Infinitum LIVE Creator Network **Diamond Incentive Program (D.I.P)** will be inactive during the following period:

**March 1, 2026 – March 31, 2026**

- No Diamond Incentive payouts will apply during this period
- This temporary pause is required to restructure and align with updated TikTok LIVE platform rules

New, revised Diamond Incentive pay charts will be released and will go live on **April 1, 2026**, applying going forward. Creators who have previously signed the agreement remain **automatically enrolled**.

---

## 🧠 Final Notes

We understand that platform changes can create uncertainty. Our goal is to remain transparent, fully compliant, and aligned with TikTok’s evolving LIVE environment while protecting the long-term stability of both our creators and the network.

If you have questions, please contact your assigned manager or use official Infinitum LIVE communication channels.

Thank you for your continued effort, professionalism, and commitment.

title: 📢 Important Notice – TikTok LIVE Policy Update (9/25/2025)
description:
📢 Important Notice – TikTok LIVE Policy Update

TikTok does not allow static or low-quality LIVE streams. To stay compliant and protect your bonuses, follow these rules:

🚫 What's NOT Allowed

• LIVE with only a static or text image
• Poorly lit streams with no visible subject
• Fixed camera showing something that doesn't move
• Being in a multi-box LIVE but only showing a static image/profile pic
• Going LIVE with just an image or greenscreen and no visible interaction

✅ What IS Required

• Show real movement & interaction at all times (talking, smiling, waving, dancing, cooking, etc.)
• If using a background/greenscreen, you must still be active and visible

⚠️ Violations = Penalties

• LIVE won't be recommended or searchable
• Bonuses reduced or removed (Payout from TikTok)
• 6+ violations = removal from the network

📝 Appeals

• If flagged, you can appeal during the LIVE or within 3 days through TikTok operations

👉 Bottom Line
Keep your LIVE active, moving, and engaging, don't just sit still or display an image.

⚠️ This is an official TikTok LIVE policy, not Infinitum's.

title: 🎉 Stream 2 Diamonds (9/8/2024–9/23/2024)
description:
🎉 Stream 2 Diamonds Campaign

Duration: 14 days → 09/08/2024 (00:00 PT) – 09/21/2024 (23:59 PT)

Eligibility: Creators participate in livestreams, complete missions, and collect points.

Rewards: Diamonds, leaderboard ranking, and a chance to win iHeart Music Festival tickets.

📊 Leaderboard & Ranking
Creators are split into four cohorts based on prior revenue & performance:

Jetsetter (400K–500K monthly revenue)
Voyager (300K–400K monthly revenue)
Explorer (200K–300K monthly revenue)
Navigator (multi-guest creators focus)

Rankings are weekly, based on total points from missions & bonus missions.
Leaderboards are public with username, profile pic, points, and ranking displayed.
TikTok may adjust points/rewards if errors or misconduct are detected.

🚀 Daily Missions (per cohort)
🛩 Jetsetter
• LIVE Match ≥ 20 min → 100 pts (x5/day)
• Receive 20 Bounce Speaker gifts → 300 pts (x5/day)
• Receive 1 Luxury Yacht gift → 500 pts (x5/day)
• Win 10 LIVE Matches → 500 pts (x5/day)

🚢 Voyager
• LIVE Match ≥ 10 min → 100 pts (x5/day)
• Receive 50 Cocktail gifts → 300 pts (x5/day)
• Receive 1 Party Boat gift → 500 pts (x5/day)
• Win 8 LIVE Matches → 500 pts (x5/day)

🌴 Explorer
• LIVE Match ≥ 10 min → 100 pts (x5/day)
• Receive 2 Pool Party gifts → 300 pts (x5/day)
• Receive 2 Pool Party gifts → 500 pts (x5/day)
• Win 6 LIVE Matches → 500 pts (x5/day)

🧭 Navigator
• Host 10 unique guests in group LIVE → 100 pts (x5/day)
• Receive 20 Bounce Speaker gifts → 300 pts (x5/day)
• Receive 10 Watermelon gifts → 500 pts (x5/day)
• Earn 23,000 diamonds from group LIVE gifts → 500 pts (x5/day)

🎁 Bonus Missions (weekly)
• Jetsetter: 10 Party Boat gifts in 7 days → +5,000 pts
• Voyager: 10 Party Boat gifts in 7 days → +5,000 pts
• Explorer: 10 Party Boat gifts in 7 days → +5,000 pts

Bonus missions can be completed once per week. Points are added to leaderboard totals.

📌 Key Rules
• Missions must be completed one at a time, in order.
• Max 1 completion per mission per day (repeatable up to 5x daily).
• Program runs strictly on Pacific Time (00:00–23:59 PT).
• Fraud, misconduct, or errors may result in loss of points/rewards.

✅ In short: Creators are grouped by revenue tier and must complete daily/weekly missions like hosting battles, winning matches, and collecting specific gifts. Points drive leaderboard rankings, which determine rewards including diamonds and potential iHeart Festival tickets.

title: 📡 TikTok LIVE Match – "Viewers Not Matched" Message Explained 📡
description:
📡 **TikTok LIVE Match – "Viewers Not Matched" Message Explained** 📡

Hi Creators,

We wanted to clarify a common issue some of you may encounter during TikTok LIVE Matches: the **"Viewers Not Matched"** message. This appears when TikTok's algorithm is unable to pair you with another host for a LIVE battle due to insufficient overlap or compatibility between your audiences.

### Why This Happens:
• **Low Viewer Engagement** – If there's minimal interaction on your stream, TikTok may not detect enough activity to create a successful match.
• **Audience Mismatch** – Major differences in your audience's interests or behavior compared to the other host may prevent pairing.
• **Technical Glitches** – Occasionally, the issue may stem from platform bugs or connection problems.

In most cases, this simply means your viewers were not engaging enough at the time of the match. We encourage you to keep promoting active interaction during your streams to improve match success!

Stay consistent, stay creative, and keep going LIVE 💎

– Infinitum LIVE Creator Network

title: 📣 Infinitum Policy Update: Box Battles & Guest Boxes
description:
📢 **Official PSA — Policy on Box Battles & Guest Box Participation**

Effective immediately, Infinitum LIVE Creator Network will **not** join or moderate any battle-box or box-battle events hosted by accounts outside our network. Additionally, Infinitum will no longer schedule or promote battle-box sessions of our own.

**Why this change matters**
1. **Earnings Impact** – Battle-box revenue now diverts a larger share to the host, so you earn **significantly less** than in standard 1-to-1 battles or solo LIVE sessions.
2. **Monthly LIVE-Time Compliance** – Minutes spent as a *guest* in someone else's box **do not count** toward Infinitum's required monthly LIVE-time thresholds. Only hours streamed from your own host window are credited.
3. **Algorithmic Performance** – Appearing in boxes—especially when cameras are switched off—lowers viewer retention and **suppresses your reach on the For You Page**.
4. **Brand & Viewer Experience** – Camera-off boxes hurt professionalism and viewer trust.

**Infinitum's stance**
• We **do not encourage** participation in box battles under current payout and visibility conditions.
• We **will not** enter external battles to push scores, gifts, or rankings.
• We **will continue** supporting your growth through coaching, strategic 1-to-1 battles, goal tracking, and high-value LIVE formats that maximize diamonds and audience retention.

**Your next steps**
• Focus on **solo or 1-to-1 battles** hosted from your own account.
• Maintain **camera-on, high-quality streams** to drive algorithmic favorability.
• Track your hours in InfiniVIEW to ensure they count toward monthly targets.
• Direct questions to your Creator Network Manager or open a ticket in the "LIVE Support" Discord channel.

title: Infinitum LIVE TikTok Raid Chain Is LIVE! 🔁
description:
Hey Creators —

Big news. We're launching something game-changing for our TikTok LIVE family... 🎥🔥

Introducing the Infinitum LIVE TikTok Raid Chain – a community-powered, momentum-building experience where we pass viewers from one creator to the next—just like Twitch raids, but made for us and made for TikTok.

🚀 What's a TikTok Raid?
It's simple:
We go live back-to-back, each for 1 hour and 1 minute, and at the end of each session, you shout out the next creator and send your viewers their way.

This means:
• More eyes on your content
• More chances to go viral together
• And a tighter, more powerful creator network ✊

🧠 How It Works:
1. You sign up for a time slot (link below).
2. You go live on TikTok at your scheduled time.
3. At the 60-minute mark:
   • Shout out the next creator
   • Pin their @handle or LIVE link in your chat
   • Encourage your viewers to "RAID" over to their stream
   • End your stream at 1 hour and 1 minute.

That's it. Your job is done, and the next creator keeps the fire going 🔥

📅 Why Join the Raid Chain?
• Grow your LIVE audience naturally
• Get discovered by other creators' communities
• Be part of a daily content wave that TikTok's algorithm loves
• Support each other and show the world what creator collaboration really looks like

✅ What You Need to Do Now:
📥 Sign up here: https://forms.gle/n57LtAEJnXwbbYtv5
🧭 Make sure your TikTok profile is set up for LIVE (must meet platform requirements)
📢 Be ready to go live, support your fellow creators, and have fun with it!

💡 Pro Tip:
Want to stand out? Use your stream to hype up the next creator with energy, vibes, or a mini countdown before your handoff. Show the viewers it's all connected 💫

Let's raid. Let's grow. Let's GO.

title: Important Reminder to All Infinitum LIVE Creators 📣
description:
Dear Creators,

We want to take a moment to thank you for your continued trust and dedication as a member of the Infinitum LIVE Creator Network. Our community thrives because of your commitment, creativity, and loyalty — and we are proud to support you every step of the way.

However, it has come to our attention that some creators have been contacted by outside networks or individuals attempting to poach or lure creators away from our community. Please understand:

🔒 This is a direct violation of both TikTok LIVE policy and your agreement with Infinitum LIVE Creator Network.

❗ Entertaining offers, conversations, or invitations from other networks while contracted with Infinitum is strictly prohibited. These actions are not only a breach of contract, but they can result in serious consequences for both the creator and the violating network.

🚫 If You Leave Due to Poaching:
The violating agency will be reported to TikTok.
That agency will receive violation points, which may lead to the termination of their agency status with TikTok.
Infinitum will pursue legal action against any individual or entity who violates our agreements or attempts to disrupt the integrity of our network.

🚫 If a Creator in Our Network Starts Their Own Agency:
This is a breach of contract and will result in termination from Infinitum LIVE.
It will also trigger legal enforcement actions, including possible claims for damages, as outlined in the agreement you signed.

We do not take these matters lightly. Our contracts are legally binding, enforceable, and designed to protect the time, effort, and trust we all put into this network.

🤝 Need Help or Have Questions?
If you're ever unsure, uncomfortable, or just need support — please reach out to your assigned manager or email us directly at support@infinitumlive.com. We are here for you. Always.

Thank you again for being a valued part of the Infinitum family. Together, we grow stronger. 💎
